sql.if: AND (p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.planner_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.mobile LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.branch_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT p.planner_id, p.name, p.planner_code, p.company_cd, c.code_name as company_name, p.branch_name, p.email, p.mobile, p.license_info, p.intro, p.deleted_at FROM TB_NTALK_USER_PLANNER p LEFT JOIN TB_NTALK_CODE c ON p.company_cd = c.code_id AND c.code_init = 'INS_COMPANY' WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY p.planner_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_NTALK_USER_PLANNER p WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT p.planner_id, p.name, p.planner_code, p.company_cd, c.code_name as company_name, p.branch_name, p.email, p.mobile, p.license_info, p.intro, p.deleted_at FROM TB_NTALK_USER_PLANNER p LEFT JOIN TB_NTALK_CODE c ON p.company_cd = c.code_id AND c.code_init = 'INS_COMPANY' WHERE p.planner_id = #{plannerId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_NTALK_USER_PLANNER SET name = #{name}, planner_code = #{plannerCode}, company_cd = #{companyCd}, branch_name = #{branchName}, email = #{email}, mobile = #{mobile}, license_info = #{licenseInfo}, intro = #{intro} WHERE planner_id = #{plannerId}

UPDATE TB_NTALK_USER_PLANNER SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE planner_id IN
#{id}
